subcodes.first_line: The pure essence of praise and glorification befitteth the Sovereign of eternity and the Lord of all worlds, Who through but a single effulgence from among the effulgences of His light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساذج ذکر و ثنا سلطان قدم و دارای عالم را سزاست که بیک تجلی از تجلیات انوار
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
